subject: Cloud Computing
title: SaaS Security and Trust
description: Learn SaaS Security and Trust in one minute.

hook.text: Your company's most sensitive data lives in 100+ SaaS applications you don't control.

buildup.text: SaaS providers must earn trust: SOC 2 audits, encryption, access controls, compliance certificates.

discovery.text: Most enterprise SaaS tools encrypt data at rest and in transit. But the provider holds the keys.

twist.text: If a SaaS vendor gets breached, your data is exposed. You're only as secure as your weakest vendor.

climax.text: SaaS security isn't just technical. It's a supply chain risk that grows with every tool you adopt.

punchline.text: You trust 100 SaaS vendors. Each one is a door to your data.

quiz.question: What is the main security risk of using many SaaS applications?
options: Each vendor is a potential entry point — you're as secure as the weakest one
SaaS applications cannot encrypt data at all
SaaS vendors always share customer data with competitors
